ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "raid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid event */,
  "itempool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item pool */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_raid_id FOREIGN KEY ("raid_id") REFERENCES raids ("raid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_itempool_id FOREIGN KEY ("itempool_id") REFERENCES itempools ("itempool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the buyer within the guild */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the buyer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the buyer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  "item_value" INTEGER /* Base value of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the item was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raids" (
  "raid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raid event */,
  "raid_name" TEXT /* Name of the raid event */,
  "raid_date" TEXT /* Date of the raid event */,
  "raid_location" TEXT /* Location of the raid event */,
  "raid_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the raid */,
  "raid_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the raid was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the raid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("raid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raids_raid_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("raid_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "itempools" (
  "itempool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item pool */,
  "itempool_name" TEXT /* Name of the item pool */,
  "itempool_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item pool */,
  "itempool_value" INTEGER /* Total value of the item pool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the item pool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the item pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itempool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guild leader, officer, member) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Quantity of items in the transaction
Role of the buyer within the guild
Timestamp of when the buyer account was created
Timestamp of the last update to the buyer account
Timestamp of when the item was added to the system
Timestamp of the last update to the item
Unique identifier for each raid event
Timestamp of when the raid was created
Timestamp of the last update to the raid
Unique identifier for each item pool
Detailed description of the item pool
Total value of the item pool
Timestamp of when the item pool was created
Timestamp of the last update to the item pool
Role of the user (e.g., guild leader, officer, member)
Timestamp of when the user account was created
Timestamp of the last update to the user account
Timestamp of the last login time of the user
